mapper.sql: id, follow_up_plan_id, register_id, is_on_time, side_effect, has_side_effect, symptom_relief, need_revisit, patient_feedback, ai_assessment, ai_advice, follow_up_time, model_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_follow_up_record WHERE follow_up_plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY follow_up_time DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
SELECT FROM ai_follow_up_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY follow_up_time DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
